reasoning: Initial observation suggests a linear relationship between x, v, t, and x0. Increasing t will help us determine if it affects x directly.
Increasing t from 2 to 3 increased x from 10 to 15, suggesting that t is a factor in determining x. To further confirm the relationship, I will now increase v.

The increase in v from 5 to 10 while keeping t constant at 3 resulted in an increase in x from 15 to 30. This suggests that both v and t are factors in determining x, and there is a linear relationship based on the observations.
